'''Entukan Yesosko''' was a flamboyant elite [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[actor/Legends|actress]] of [[Rodian Theater/Legends|Rodian Theater]]. A member of the [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza clan]], she was an avid supporter of the [[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]] [[Navik the Red]], with the ambition of writing a play based on his life.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

She was appointed as the leader of the [[Rodian Galactic Drama Troupe]], the only Rodian theatrical corps allowing to leave the planet. She was the Troupe's most famous member and front woman, and played lead roles in Ghest plays (classic tragedies where Rodian villages were devastated by a [[Ghest/Legends|ghest]]).<ref name="guide" />

She also acted as Navik's [[agent/Legends|agent]], the only member of the Troupe knowing its secondary use to target Chattza enemies; she agreed to inform the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Inntak]] of their schedules, and whenever [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] attended their performances. Some members knew of that operation, but fearing her reaction, they kept their knowledge secret, and few dared to sabotage it by tipping off their comrades.<ref name="guide" />
